config.training_policy: Fit on first 70% chronological block of train session, select guarded caps on last 30% validation block, evaluate full held-out session; run both directions.
config.feature_policy: Causal anchor-time features only; excludes labels as inputs, future reference fields, target reference indices, reference nearest distance, source ZIP, and session ID.

phase7_best.direct_product_relevance: teacher-only unless distilled/gated; zero >5px but broad small regressions remain

recommendation.rule: Product relevance requires zero >5px regressions; zero >1/>3 plus p95/p99 improvement is the strict direct-shipping screen. Material GPU change requires the best zero-visible CUDA teacher to beat Phase 7 p99 by at least 0.25px.
recommendation.summary: No CUDA model cleared the zero >5px plus p99-improvement screen.
